author: edgl_dev
content:
I filled the FOCIL execution-spec tests after merging them locally with the bal-devnet-7 test release, and ran them using an in-process engine-API fixture runner we have (extended to handle inclusion list payloads and the INCLUSION_LIST_UNSATISFIED status) and got all 13 cases passing

I'm unsure if there are other more up to date tests that fit glam-5

author: jih2nn
content: Currently there are no more tests but the upcoming spec changes will change existing tests and add new tests. Once the spec changes are figured out, I can discuss with <@510888004366368794> to apply those changes to tests.

author: bharath.vedartham
content:
I am thinking about how a builder can set the `inclusion_list_bits` in the bid: https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/e17a1389e6cee2f44e6b873e324ad4cb0172e341/specs/heze/beacon-chain.md#L92
I get the inclusion list txs to be included in the payload via the payload attributes sse event. now I need to populate the `inclusion_list_bits`.  I wonder if this data should be sent in the SSE event too?

author: bharath.vedartham
content: we could also fetch it via a beacon api separately and populate it too. I wonder what the correct way is

author: bharath.vedartham
content: a potential problem with a separate beacon api is that the state with which the payload attributes event is created and the state when the api queries the `inclusion_list_bits` might be different which can give different results

author: bharath.vedartham
content: currently, the only way I have is to listen to the inclusion list SSE event and maintain my own inclusion list store in the builder
